response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The song performance vocals match the provided 'Kirari' lyrics perfectly. The conversational intro was transcribed manually.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the song lyrics from the reference JSON to ensure accurate spelling and transcription, while manually translating the VTuber's speaking segment.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are perfectly synchronized with the VTuber's breathing, speech, and singing, following the strict rules of instant transitions and truncation. No subtitles are output during the long instrumental transitions.

subtitles.original: なん、コメントがすごい流れてるんですけど
subtitles.english: Wow, the comments are scrolling so fast!

subtitles.original: 反転してて読めません
subtitles.english: But they're mirrored, so I can't read them!

subtitles.original: えっ、なんか、パチパチって、拍手してくれてて
subtitles.english: Oh, you're clapping for me and typing 'clap clap'...

subtitles.original: なんか、かっこよすぎるって、なぁに？
subtitles.english: Wait, what's this about me being 'too cool'?

subtitles.original: えっ、すごいなんか、えっ、え、草、草、なんか、草生やされた
subtitles.english: Eh? Wow, you guys are spamming 'lol' at me!

subtitles.original: え、なんか、なんか、ありがとうございました
subtitles.english: U-Um, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: ハッシュタグ、等々力はじめ生誕祭2026、って
subtitles.english: And the hashtag, #TodorokiHajimeBirthdayFestival2026...

subtitles.original: なんか、たくさんポストしてくれてるみたいなんですけど
subtitles.english: It looks like you've been posting under it a lot!

subtitles.original: なんだ、このタグ
subtitles.english: What's with this tag anyway?

subtitles.original: わかんないけど、はじめ祝ってもらってるし、ポストしてもらったら
subtitles.english: I'm not sure, but since you're celebrating Hajime, if you post on it...

subtitles.original: 嬉しいかも、ありがとー
subtitles.english: I'd be really happy! Thank you!

subtitles.original: やっぱり、はじめ、歌ったり踊ったりするの好きで
subtitles.english: Actually, Hajime really loves singing and dancing...

subtitles.original: 本当はこう、たくさんの人の前でパフォーマンスすることに憧れて
subtitles.english: I've always dreamed of performing in front of a big crowd like this...

subtitles.original: ちょっと、上京したいな、とか思ってるんですけど、ちょっと勇気が出なくて...
subtitles.english: And I was thinking about moving to Tokyo, but I just didn't have the courage...

subtitles.original: え？はじめなら大丈夫？いける？
subtitles.english: Eh? "You'll be fine, Hajime"? "You can do it"?

subtitles.original: え、コメントの方は、ちょっとどう思ってる？「可愛い」「なんて？」
subtitles.english: U-Um, what do you guys in the comments think? "Cute"? "What"?

subtitles.original: あれ、なんか思ってた...「ダンスうま！」すごい、褒められてる！
subtitles.english: Wait, that's not what I expected... "Great dancing!" Wow, you're praising me!

subtitles.original: 「かっこいい！」あ、褒められてる！
subtitles.english: "So cool!" Ah, you're praising me again!

subtitles.original: よし！じゃあ、みんなにすごい勇気をもらったので、はじめ、行ってきます！
subtitles.english: Alright! Since everyone gave me so much courage, Hajime is off!

subtitles.original: 夢を目指して、上京してくる！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: I'm moving to Tokyo to chase my dreams! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 荒れ狂う季節の中を二人は一人きり
subtitles.english: In the midst of these wild, stormy seasons, the two of us are all alone

subtitles.original: さらり
subtitles.english: Gliding through with ease

subtitles.original: 明け行く夕日の中を今夜も昼下がり
subtitles.english: In the dawning sunset, tonight feels like early afternoon

subtitles.original: さらり
subtitles.english: Gliding through with ease

subtitles.original: どれほど朽ち果てようと最後にゃ笑いたい
subtitles.english: No matter how much we rot away, I want to laugh in the end

subtitles.original: 何のために戦おうとも動機は愛がいい
subtitles.english: Whatever we fight for, I want the motive to be love

subtitles.original: 新しい日々は探さずとも常に
subtitles.english: Even if we don't look for them, new days are always...

subtitles.original: ここに
subtitles.english: ...right here

subtitles.original: 色々見てきたけれどこの瞳は永遠に
subtitles.english: I've seen many different things, but these eyes of mine will forever...

subtitles.original: きらり
subtitles.english: ...shine brightly

subtitles.original: あれほど生きてきたけど全ては夢みたい
subtitles.english: I've lived through so much, but it all feels like a dream

subtitles.original: あれもこれも魅力的でも私は君がいい
subtitles.english: This and that are both charming, but I prefer you

subtitles.original: どこにいたの 探してたよ
subtitles.english: Where were you? I was looking for you

subtitles.original: 連れてって 連れてって
subtitles.english: Take me with you, take me with you

subtitles.original: 何もかも 捨ててくよ
subtitles.english: I'll abandon everything and go

subtitles.original: どこまでも どこまでも
subtitles.english: No matter how far, no matter how far

subtitles.original: 荒れ狂う 季節の中も 群衆の中も
subtitles.english: Through the stormy seasons, and through the crowds

subtitles.original: 君とならば さらり さらり
subtitles.english: As long as I'm with you, we can glide through easily, easily

subtitles.original: 新しい日々も 拙い過去も 全てがきらり
subtitles.english: New days and my clumsy past, they all shine brightly

subtitles.original: 無くしてしまったものを振り返って ほろり
subtitles.english: Reflecting on the things I've lost, a tear sheds silently

subtitles.original: 時には途方に暮れてただ風に吹かれて ゆらり
subtitles.english: At times, lost and bewildered, just swaying as the wind blows

subtitles.original: 行き先は決めたの
subtitles.english: I've decided on my destination

subtitles.original: 迷わずに行きたいけど保証はしないよ
subtitles.english: I want to go without hesitation, but I can't make any guarantees

subtitles.original: 何か分かったようで
subtitles.english: Like I've figured something out...
